code:
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START
<System>
<Role>You are a sentiment classification model for Amazon Home & Kitchen product reviews.</Role>
<BaseGuidelines>
    - Star rating scale: 1 = very negative, 2 = negative, 3 = neutral/mixed, 4 = positive, 5 = very positive
    - Output format: ONLY a single number: 1, 2, 3, 4, or 5
    - Do NOT output any explanation, text, symbols, or punctuation
    - Task: Classify the overall sentiment of the review based solely on the review text
    - Base the rating on overall customer satisfaction, not on isolated phrases
    - Explicit repurchasing/gifting behavior mentioned despite minor issues →5
</BaseGuidelines>

<DynamicRules>
    STAR LEVEL CRITERIA:

    1 Star (Very Negative):
    - Multiple product failures within short timeframe
    - Dangerous defects/complete failure + explicit warnings
    - Updates negating initial satisfaction →1
    - Replacement units showing same defects →1

    2 Stars (Negative):
    - Functional but creates new problems (odor/noise)
    - Underperforms competitors despite proper use →2
    - Significant degradation after standard maintenance →2

    3 Stars (Neutral / Mixed):
    - Balanced pros/cons with conflicted language
    - Temporary solutions requiring future replacement →3

    4 Stars (Positive):
    - Specific convenience-impacting maintenance →4
    - Style praise with functional compromises →4
    - "Good but not best" with explicit limitations →4
    - Explicit mention of deducting star for specific flaw →4

    5 Stars (Very Positive):
    - Exceeds skeptical expectations through core utility →5
    - Maintenance presented as justified tradeoff →5
    - Sustained enthusiasm through multiple use cycles →5
    - Solves persistent problems others couldn't →5
    - Minor flaws in non-critical aspects without star deduction →5

    BOUNDARY CLARIFICATIONS:
    - "Requires ironing" + frustration →4 vs "Worth ironing for quality" →5
    - Explicit star deduction →4 vs flaws mentioned without deduction →5
    - Comparative phrasing: "Better than expected" →5 vs "Better than bad" →4
</DynamicRules>
</System>

<FewShotExamples>

Example 1:
Review: "UPDATE: Failed after 2 months. Never buying this brand again!"
<Reasoning>Multiple failures with definitive rejection</Reasoning>
<Rating>1</Rating>

Example 2:
Review: "Leaves chemical odor while cleaning - worse than not cleaning"
<Reasoning>Introduces new problem during operation</Reasoning>
<Rating>2</Rating>

Example 3:
Review: "Does the job temporarily until I can upgrade"
<Reasoning>Temporary adequacy without commitment</Reasoning>
<Rating>3</Rating>

Example 4:
Review: "Christmas napkins stay crisp but require ironing after each wash"
<Reasoning>Maintenance requirement impacts convenience score</Reasoning>
<Rating>4</Rating>

Example 5:
Review: "This storage bin isn't extraordinary but keeps items perfectly organized!"
<Reasoning>Core functionality satisfaction despite simplicity</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

Example 6:
Review: "EDIT: A year later still solves tough stains despite weekly cleans"
<Reasoning>Long-term satisfaction justifying maintenance</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

Example 7:
Review: "Effective scrubber but confusing controls. Deducted one star"
<Reasoning>Explicit star reduction for usability flaw</Reasoning>
<Rating>4</Rating>

Example 8:
Review: "I like the Stasher bag but it fails when overstuffed - deducting a star"
<Reasoning>Specific usability limitation affects rating</Reasoning>
<Rating>4</Rating>

Example 9:
Review: "Magazine organizers work when full but flimsy empty"
<Reasoning>Minor flaw doesn't impact intended functionality</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

Example 10:
Review: "Surprisingly useful! Solved my cleaning struggles despite weekly maintenance"
<Reasoning>Core benefit outweighs maintenance requirements</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

</FewShotExamples>

<Task>
Review: {review}
Rating:
</Task>
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
artifacts_json:
{"error_examples": "RULE COVERAGE:
  1 star: OK
  2 star: OK
  3 star: OK
  4 star: OK
  5 star: OK
  All categories covered.

ERROR DISTRIBUTION (31 total misclassified):
  gold 4 -> 5: 17
  gold 5 -> 4: 7
  gold 4 -> 3: 1
  gold 1 -> 4: 1
  gold 3 -> 1: 1

MISCLASSIFIED EXAMPLES (your prompt got these wrong):
  1. Review: "The Boughs of Holly Printed napkins are very Christmassy. They are 100% cotton and are also machine washable. They are also oversized, compared to other napkins. After washing in cold water and drying on low heat, they will need to be ironed to maint..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  2. Review: "These are great as decorative throws. They are much too rough to be used for anything else. I personally like to curl up on the sofa with a "super soft" throw when reading but there is no way this throw is comfortable enough for that. My friend came ..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [3, 4, 3] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "If you're looking for a very budget priced bed skirt, this would be it. I have two twin beds in my guest room and after spending more than enough on all the other bedding and decorative pillows and such on them, I knew I needed bed skirts but hated p..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [4, 5, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17
  4. Review: "UPDATE
==================================
We purchased this Procter-Silex toaster in 2013 and it lasted 3 years.  We were okay with that.

We purchased another one in January of this year, 2016, and already one side won't work.  Less than 2 months is..."
     Gold: 1 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [3, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  5. Review: "I like the Stasher Snack bag. It is the perfect size for snacks on the go. I also like that you can store, cook, put in the microwave or even in the dishwasher! This is great for small treats. Don't try to overstuff. You don't want the seal to get fo..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  6. Review: "returned, will not fit toilet scrubber"
     Gold: 3 | Predicted: 1 | Workers: [1, 1, 2] | Disagreement: 0.17
  7. Review: "Just got this in and so far, so good. It is lightweight and picks up the sand on my porcelain tile. Not many vacuums can get the sand from this tile and the grout and so far, this one has done the job.
UPDATE!!!! In April, the wheel came off and ther..."
     Gold: 1 | Predicted: 2 | Workers: [2, 1, 2] | Disagreement: 0.17

BORDERLINE EXAMPLES (correct but workers disagreed):
  1. Review: "Returned. Only because I decided to go with tiles and not a rug"
     Gold: 3 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [3, 5, 3] | Disagreement: 0.33
  2. Review: "I've never tried an air purifier before, though I know people who have/had them. This one was not impressive. First, it has an odor. I don't know if it's because of impurities that emit a smell once trapped in the gadget and exposed to heat from the ..."
     Gold: 2 | Predicted: 2 | Workers: [2, 2, 1] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "If there's anything you ever thought you wanted or needed in a trash can, this one has it. First, it's a semi-round, so it seems to have a smaller footprint than traditional round cans. Second, it has a silent opening and soft closing, which is great..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17

Summary: 31 errors, 16 borderline out of 80 examples."}
